name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 2 Jul 2020
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Released as a single feature enhancement, the revamp of custom campaign reports is one of many improvements planned for the reporting section."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn about what changed, read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancements"}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Enhanced User Experience for Custom Campaign Reports","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"As part of Maropost's user experience transformation, we reevaluated and improved the report-building flow for the custom campaign reports. The UI has also been redesigned as per our latest design standards, leading to improvements in overall look-and-feel and user experience. While the number of steps remains the same, you will now notice slight changes in how you build the report in each step."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn about the custom campaign reports, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/835-custom-email-campaign-report","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Creating a Custom Campaign Report"}]},{"text":"."}]}]
